line 1: welcome to the sample
line 2: unix tools are powerful
line 3: searching is common in logs
line 4: no match here, just text
line 5: another normal line
line 6: random words and phrases
grep finds matching lines
line 8: this line has nothing
grep appears at the beginning
ending with grep
monkey contains key but not grep
line 12: more filler line
line 13: even more filler line
line 14: still filler
pattern-at-end-grep
grep grep grep
line 17: almost done with simple section
line 18: one more filler
line 19: yet another filler
final grep line

# === Stress #1: keyword = aaaaab (classic naive worst-case) ===





# === Stress #2: keyword = abababaX (failure-link heavy) ===




# === Stress #3: Fibonacci-like string (heavy overlap) ===


# === Stress #4: scattered matches for keyword = needle ===
